introduction: OpenAI, a leading artificial intelligence research organization, has been at the forefront of AI innovation [N]. Founded with the mission to develop and promote friendly AI, OpenAI has made significant strides in recent years, including the launch of ChatGPT and GPT-4 [N]. This report aims to provide an overview of OpenAI's latest product developments, strategic partnerships, and the implications of these advancements on the company's future direction [N].
executive_summary: OpenAI has introduced Aardvark, an AI agent that thinks like a security researcher, now available in private beta [N]. The company has also formed strategic partnerships with Intuit and Broadcom to bring new AI-powered experiences and deploy custom AI accelerators [N]. These developments demonstrate OpenAI's commitment to advancing AI research and its applications, and are likely to have a significant impact on the company's growth and influence in the industry [N].

key_findings.finding_summary: Aardvark has identified 92% of known and synthetically-introduced vulnerabilities in benchmark testing and has discovered and responsibly disclosed numerous vulnerabilities in open-source projects [N]
OpenAI has partnered with Intuit to bring new Intuit app experiences in ChatGPT and with Broadcom to deploy 10 gigawatts of custom AI accelerators [N]

official_insights.title: Introducing Aardvark: OpenAI’s agentic security researcher
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI has introduced Aardvark, an AI agent that thinks like a security researcher, now available in private beta and built directly into Codex as Codex Security [1]
official_insights.overview: Aardvark is an autonomous agent that can help developers and security teams discover and fix security vulnerabilities at scale, using LLM-powered reasoning and tool-use to understand code behavior and identify vulnerabilities [1]
key_findings: Aardvark identified 92% of known and synthetically-introduced vulnerabilities in benchmark testing [1]
Aardvark has discovered and responsibly disclosed numerous vulnerabilities in open-source projects [1]
official_insights.strategic_analysis: Aardvark has the potential to tip the balance in favor of defenders in the field of software security, by providing a scalable and effective solution for identifying and fixing vulnerabilities [1]
official_insights.analysis: Aardvark's multi-stage pipeline and ability to integrate with existing workflows make it a valuable tool for security teams and developers [1]
official_insights.why_it_matters: Aardvark's capabilities can contribute to the security of the open source software ecosystem and supply chain, and its pro-bono scanning offering can benefit non-commercial open source repositories [1]
official_insights.business_impact: Impact on enterprise adoption, competition, and market positioning, as Aardvark is now available to ChatGPT Enterprise, Business, and Edu customers via Codex web [1]
official_insights.practical_significance: Aardvark can help reduce the number of vulnerabilities in software, making it a significant development in the field of software security [1]
official_insights.technical_context: Aardvark uses GPT-5 and LLM-powered reasoning to understand code behavior and identify vulnerabilities, making it a cutting-edge solution in the field of AI and security research [1]

trusted_insights.title: Intuit and OpenAI join forces on new AI-powered experiences
trusted_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI and Intuit have entered a multi-year strategic partnership to bring new Intuit app experiences in ChatGPT [2]
trusted_insights.overview: The partnership will deepen Intuit’s use of OpenAI’s frontier models to accelerate its AI-driven expert platform strategy [2]
key_findings: Intuit apps will soon be available directly within ChatGPT [2]
OpenAI’s models will help power select Intuit AI agents across its products [2]
trusted_insights.strategic_analysis: The partnership combines OpenAI’s most advanced models and global scale with Intuit's platform capabilities [2]
trusted_insights.analysis: The partnership is designed to empower businesses to increase revenue and profitability based on their real-time business data with more personalized insights and less effort [2]
trusted_insights.why_it_matters: The partnership will help consumers make smarter financial choices and businesses improve their financial position [2]
trusted_insights.business_impact: Impact on enterprise adoption, competition, and market positioning [2]
trusted_insights.practical_significance: Consumers will soon be able to get personalized insights and take action with Intuit apps within ChatGPT [2]
trusted_insights.technical_context: OpenAI’s models will support tasks such as cash-flow forecasting, tax preparation, and payroll management [2]

trusted_insights.title: OpenAI and Broadcom announce strategic collaboration to deploy 10 gigawatts of OpenAI-designed AI accelerators
trusted_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI and Broadcom announced a multi-year partnership to deploy 10 gigawatts of custom AI accelerators [3]
trusted_insights.overview: The partnership enables OpenAI and Broadcom to deliver accelerator and network systems for next-generation AI clusters [3]
key_findings: OpenAI will design the accelerators and systems, which will be developed and deployed in partnership with Broadcom [3]
The racks will meet surging global demand for AI, with deployments across OpenAI’s facilities and partner data centers [3]
trusted_insights.strategic_analysis: The collaboration is a critical step in building the infrastructure needed to unlock AI’s potential and deliver real benefits for people and businesses [3]
trusted_insights.analysis: Developing custom AI accelerators adds to the broader ecosystem of partners all building the capacity required to push the frontier of AI [3]
trusted_insights.why_it_matters: The partnership will help OpenAI advance its mission to ensure that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity [3]
trusted_insights.business_impact: Impact on enterprise adoption, competition, and market positioning [3]
trusted_insights.practical_significance: The collaboration will power breakthroughs in AI and bring the technology’s full potential closer to reality [3]
trusted_insights.technical_context: The racks will be scaled entirely with Ethernet and other connectivity solutions from Broadcom [3]

trusted_insights.title: Ten years - OpenAI
trusted_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI has achieved breakthroughs in its mission towards AGI over the past decade, including the launch of ChatGPT and GPT-4 [4]
trusted_insights.overview: OpenAI reflects on its decade-long journey, highlighting its progress, learnings, and strategy for making AI beneficial to humanity [4]
key_findings: OpenAI launched ChatGPT three years ago, followed by GPT-4, which integrated AI into the world at an unprecedented scale and speed [4]
The company developed a strategy to make AI maximally beneficial to the world [4]
trusted_insights.strategic_analysis: OpenAI's progress and strategy have significant implications for the development and adoption of AI, particularly in the context of AGI [4]
trusted_insights.analysis: The company's ability to scale up its technology and execute its vision has been crucial to its success, with hundreds of decisions made weekly [4]
trusted_insights.why_it_matters: OpenAI's work has the potential to impact various aspects of society, making its mission and strategy critically important [4]
trusted_insights.business_impact: Impact on enterprise adoption, competition, and market positioning [4]
trusted_insights.practical_significance: The development and integration of AI at scale have significant practical implications for various industries and applications [4]
trusted_insights.technical_context: OpenAI's technical work, including its pioneering efforts in making AI safe and robust, has been instrumental in its progress [4]

cross_source_analysis: The introduction of Aardvark and the partnerships with Intuit and Broadcom demonstrate OpenAI's strategic direction towards advancing AI research and its applications [N]. The company's focus on security and collaboration with industry leaders is likely to drive innovation and growth in the AI sector [N]. Furthermore, the deployment of custom AI accelerators will meet the surging global demand for AI, enabling OpenAI to expand its capabilities and influence [N].
conclusion: OpenAI's latest product developments and strategic partnerships demonstrate the company's commitment to advancing AI research and its applications [N]. The introduction of Aardvark and the partnerships with Intuit and Broadcom are likely to have a significant impact on the company's growth and influence in the industry [N]. As OpenAI continues to innovate and expand its capabilities, it is likely to remain a leading player in the AI sector, driving innovation and shaping the future of artificial intelligence [N].

references.title: OpenAI and Broadcom announce strategic collaboration to deploy 10 gigawatts of OpenAI-designed AI accelerators - OpenAI
references.snippet:
“Our partnership with OpenAI continues to set new industry benchmarks for the design and deployment of open, scalable and power-efficient AI clusters,” said Charlie Kawwas, Ph. D., President of the Semiconductor Solutions Group for Broadcom. “Custom accelerators combine remarkably well with standards-based Ethernet scale-up and scale-out networking solutions to provide cost and performance optimized next generation AI infrastructure. The racks include Broadcom’s end-to-end portfolio of Ethernet, PCIe and optical connectivity solutions, reaffirming our AI infrastructure portfolio leadership.”

For Broadcom, this collaboration reinforces the importance of custom accelerators and the choice of Ethernet as the technology for scale-up and scale-out networking in AI datacenters. [...] “Broadcom’s collaboration with OpenAI signifies a pivotal moment in the pursuit of artificial general intelligence,” said Hock Tan, President and CEO of Broadcom. “OpenAI has been in the forefront of the AI revolution since the ChatGPT moment, and we are thrilled to co-develop and deploy 10 gigawatts of next generation accelerators and network systems to pave the way for the future of AI.”

“Our collaboration with Broadcom will power breakthroughs in AI and bring the technology’s full potential closer to reality,” said OpenAI co-founder and President, Greg Brockman. “By building our own chip, we can embed what we’ve learned from creating frontier models and products directly into the hardware, unlocking new levels of capability and intelligence.” [...] For Business

references.title: Ten years - OpenAI
references.snippet:
The world has been able to use this technology to do extraordinary things, and we expect much more extraordinary things in even the next year. The world has also done a good job so far of mitigating the potential downsides, and we need to work to keep doing that. [...] I have never felt more optimistic about our research and product roadmaps, and overall line of sight towards our mission. In ten more years, I believe we are almost certain to build superintelligence. I expect the future to feel weird; in some sense, daily life and the things we care most about will change very little, and I’m sure we will continue to be much more focused on what other people do than we will be on what machines do. In some other sense, the people of 2035 will be capable of doing things that I just don’t think we can easily imagine right now. [...] Switch to

 ChatGPT(opens in a new window)
 Sora(opens in a new window)
 API Platform(opens in a new window)

OpenAI

December 11, 2025

Company

# Ten years

Reflections on a decade of breakthroughs, learnings, and the path toward AGI that benefits all of humanity.

OpenAI has achieved more than I dared to dream possible; we set out to do something crazy, unlikely, and unprecedented. From a deeply uncertain start and against all reasonable odds, with continued hard work it now looks like we have a shot to succeed at our mission.

We announced our effort to the world ten years ago today, though we didn’t officially get started⁠(opens in a new window) for another few weeks, in early January of 2016.
